jtwc.title: Tropical Storm 05E (Elida) Warning #09
jtwc.text:
WTPN31 PHNC 162200
MSGID/GENADMIN/JOINT TYPHOON WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI//
SUBJ/TROPICAL STORM 05E (ELIDA) WARNING NR 009//
RMKS/
